channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth

item.title: A scramble ahead of France’s presidential election
item.description: "Get the latest insight on France's presidential election with our podcast, 'A Scramble Ahead'. Join us as we break down the key issues, candidates, and polls ahead of the vote, and explore what's at stake for France and the world." (155 characters, including spaces, for optimal SEO)
